title: DIMCP EP_15 Tracy-Bell #222
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_15 Tracy-Bell #222.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] Welcome back to this show dog in my co-pilot
[00:00:04.56] Hi there. How's it going?
[00:00:06.56] I'm gonna bring you ready.
[00:00:08.56] It's almost 2-2-2 o'clock.
[00:00:12.96] This is a sacred moment.
[00:00:14.96] Um, could I get two bean burritos?
[00:00:18.96] And Tracy loves burritos.
[00:00:22.96] Can I get three times the red sauce on that?
[00:00:26.00] Oh, Tracy loves red sauce.
[00:00:28.00] What is it?
[00:00:29.40] Could I get like three times the amount of red sauce on each of those bean burritos?
[00:00:33.16] How many bean burritos?
[00:00:34.20] Two.
[00:00:36.20] Or just extra red sauce.
[00:00:37.64] And then, can I get no onions?
[00:00:40.68] And a large mountain dew.
[00:00:44.28] And nacho cheese burritos locos taco.
[00:00:49.88] Yeah, can I get no lettuce on that?
[00:00:53.64] And extra cheese, please.
[00:00:55.32] Yeah車 officers.
[00:00:58.04] Or the taco?
